case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. OZZY MURILLO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, OZZY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURILLO, OZZY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 44 MCALLISTER STREET, #614, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, OZZY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-21-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, OZZY
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE. SIGNED BY ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF, MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.73 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, OZZY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, OZZY
